feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red returned to Pokemon Tower and reached the Silph Scope floor.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red stayed beside Antman as the Silph Scope made the tower's hidden grief visible.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill confirmed the Silph Scope is separating a true spirit signal from Team Moonlight's dream pressure.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Marowak's spirit has been revealed by the Silph Scope.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Cubone reacted to Marowak's spirit, turning the Lavender mystery into a personal rescue.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight is using Pokemon Tower grief as a ritual amplifier.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket is holding Mr. Fuji higher in the tower to control the Poke Flute lead.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Mr. Fuji's rescue path is unlocked.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill marked the Poke Flute as the next field-tool lead after the tower pressure breaks.
